skills.description: Set up and authenticate the Xpoz MCP server for social media intelligence. Required by all Xpoz skills. Handles server configuration, OAuth login, and connection verification with minimal user interaction.
skills.description_zh: 设置并认证Xpoz MCP服务器以实现社交媒体情报功能。所有Xpoz技能的必备前置。仅需极少用户交互即可处理服务器配置、OAuth登录及连接验证。
skills.name: Xpoz Setup

skills.description: Support accounting understanding from basic bookkeeping to professional practice and research.

skills.name: Accounting
